div.p: Welcome to the Odoo Beauty Parlor package!

This module provides a comprehensive suite of applications tailored to the needs of beauty parlors, empowering you to manage your business efficiently, schedule treatments seamlessly, sell products or treatments directly at the front desk, and deliver exceptional client experiences.

By installing this package, you'll have access to a range of essential apps, including CRM, Appointments, Website, Point of Sales, and Invoicing, all designed to help you manage bookings, track client preferences, and handle payments smoothly. Let’s explore how these modules can streamline your beauty parlor operations.

To begin, you'll find the key applications you need on your Odoo dashboard. Let’s take a closer look at how you can use these tools to manage treatments, appointments, and client relationships; all from one place.
You can access every installed App in your Odoo database on your main dashboard.

ul.li: Appointments App: Offer online booking for treatments and services so your clients can schedule sessions 24/7.

font.span: CRM App: Track client interactions, preferences , and follow-ups all in one central hub to nurture long-term relationships.

ul.li: Calendar App: Manage your daily schedule efficiently, avoid double bookings, and ensure enough preparation time between clients.
Invoicing App: Generate professional invoices for treatments, packages, and subscriptions, making sure you get paid on time.
Sales App: Sell treatment packages, gift cards, and retail products with clear quotations and pricing.
Point of Sale App: Let clients pay at the front desk and purchase retail products immediately after their treatments.
Contacts App: Keep a clean and organized directory of your clients, suppliers, and professional partners.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 ms-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: Odoo is entirely integrated into an App. Download it to turn your phone to manage your entire business in it.
By uploading this module's demo data, your database has been filled with a few contacts.
You should be able to execute the following flows to have an overview of various flows you can quickly execute with this package using Odoo.
Of course, this is just an overview of the features included in this package. Feel free to add new apps, delete/modify demo data, and test everything around!

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-warning pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 ms-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: You didn't import demo data? You can still do it. Go to Apps > Industries > Upgrade your Beauty Parlor package and check the related box.
You receive a call from a new potential client, Emily, who is interested in your beauty treatments services.
In the CRM App , you create a new lead for Emily, capturing her contact information and the reason for her inquiry.
As you qualify Emily's needs, you update the lead status to "Qualified" in the CRM pipeline.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: You can also configure an email alias so everyone sending email to this one will create a new opportunity for you.
To do so, go to CRM > Configuration > Sales Teams.
A new potential client, Julie, visits your beauty parlor website and is interested in your treatments.

li.p: On the website, she can browse all your services; facials, massages, nail care, waxing and select the one she wants to book.
When Julie books an appointment online, a new opportunity is automatically created for her in the CRM App, capturing her contact details and selected service.

div.p: If you want to share your calendar easily, navigate to the Appointment App and select "Share" on the Edit Button.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: You can set the consultation with an upfront online payment. Activate it in your Appointment Type Settings by setting up an upfront payment method.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: After the treatment is completed, updating Emily’s opportunity status to Treatments Completed in the CRM will automatically send her an email suggesting her next appointment.
If you want to adapt your flow and set new automation rules, click the Gear Icon in the top of a CRM column and select "Automation", or add automated email in your Appointment Type.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: To reduce your no show rate drastically, appointments automatically comes with reminders by Email and SMS.
Once the appointment is booked, navigate to the Calendar App. You may find the new appointment. You can also move it (Emily will be notified) or cancel it.
The Appointment App is automatically updated based on your Calendar. You can easily lock slots, change appointment hours and send communication to your patients from the Calendar App.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: The Odoo Calendar App is compatible with Outlook and Google Calendar. Activate the sync in the Calendar App settings.

div.h3: 4. Accept payments at the front desk
div.p: After the treatment, use the Point of Sale App to let clients pay quickly at the front desk or purchase retail products. In just a few clicks, you can select the service or product and validate the payment.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: The Odoo Point of Sale works online and offline, so you can keep selling even without an internet connection.

div.h3: 5. Reward loyal clients and offer tailored prices
div.p: Reward loyal clients and attract new ones with Gift Cards and Loyalty Programs and offer tailored prices with Pricelists.

ul.li: Go to Discount & Loyalty and create a new Loyalty Card. Set a Loyalty Rule , for example: after purchasing 5 treatments (booking session), the 6th treatment is free.
Go to Sales > Pricelists and create a tailored price for a specific group. For example, give 10% off treatments for students.
Create a product as a Gift card (e.g., 50€ Gift Card), set it as available for sale on your website or at the front desk, and clients can redeem it for treatments at checkout.

div.p: If you navigate to the Invoice App, you can manage your invoices. You have many possibilities to streamline your invoicing process:

ul.li: Auto-post your invoice on a regular basis.
Add an upfront payment in your Appointment Type.
Invoice yourself, manually.
Add the Subscription App and invoice automatically based on a subscription type.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 ms-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: You completed that demo use case! There are millions of other ways to adapt your Odoo setup to fit your business needs.
Discover more about Odoo by diving into ourdocumentation and academy , and feel free torequest a demo if you need help!

span.strong: Do you want to go further?

div.p: Odoo offers you infinite possibilities, such as :

ul.li: Organize staff schedules effortlessly with the Planning App , and let clients book their favorite time slots online.
Offer recurring packages or memberships with the Subscription App , and automate recurring invoicing in a few clicks.
Streamline your finances with a fully integrated Accounting App , making accounting simpler than ever.
Manage all your marketing channels in one place with Odoo Marketing Automation ; email, social media, and SMS campaigns included.
Keep your team organized and connected across all processes by adding the Employees App.
Manage stock and products efficiently with the Inventory App , keeping track of retail items, and supplies.
Host workshops, beauty events, or special promotions easily using the Events App.

div.p: These all go free in your current subscription; feel free to explore! 🙃

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 ms-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: Would you like to discuss your Odoo setup with us or go even further?
